case_title: YEAT POH KOH VS. YI ZHONG SHEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT CREDITOR AGREES TO ACCEPT INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR AT THREE FOR $446.00 AND ONE FOR $140.00 (COSTS). JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS $446 BY CHECK TODAY. JUDGMENT CREDITOR PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AMY LO. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOH, YEAT POH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEN, YI ZHONG $1,337.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AMY LO. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER AI DONG NI. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
